titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Edmund Burke Letters
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 7040480.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

conventiondeclaration.abbr: beinecke manuscript unit archival processing manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.beinecke manuscript unit archival processing manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 05:55

did.unittitle: [Edmund Burke letters]

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: For provenance information, consult the appropriate curator.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Osborn c8 is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Edmund Burke, Correspondence. James Marshall and Marie-Louise Osborn Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This finding aid was produced from a previously existing list or card set. All pertinent bibliographical information has been retained; the volume may contain additional unlisted material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The following finding aid is a complete inventory of the contents of Osborn c8. This list was reformatted from previously existing cataloging.

did.unittitle: BURKE, EDMUND, 1729-1797
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
2 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
An invitation to come over from
Ireland.
8/1

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
Journey to Bath.
8/2

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
2 p.; 20 x 18 cm.
The health of King's brother
sojourning in Nice.
8/4

did.unittitle: ALS to Frances Anne (Greville) Crewe, lady Crewe (d. 1818)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
The health of personal acquaintances.
8/5

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Bath
3 p.; 24 x 19 cm. Personal financial matters. 8/6

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
Personal financial matters.
8/7

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
Personal financial matters; Burke
needs money.
8/8

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
3 p.; 20 x 13 cm.
The financial matters of a mutual
friend.
8/9

did.unittitle: ALS to [Edward James] Nagle

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 20 x 13 cm.
Publishing matters.
8/10

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
3 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
The religious education of a child;
Richard Brockelsby (1722-1797).
8/12

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
[1796 after May 14]
n.p.
1 p.; 18 x 12 cm. Financial matters. "Burke Correspondence", ix. 8/14

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
4 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
"Burke Correspondence", viii, 460.
8/15

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
[1795 after Nov 30]
n.p.
1 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
The king's wife and niece; thoughts
on regicide and current Parliamentary
discussions.
"Burke Correspondence", viii, 353.
8/16

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester 1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 19 x 12 cm.
Mrs. Craven's dispute with a bishop.
"Burke Correspondence", viii, 453.
8/17

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 25 x 20 cm.
The loss of a new addition to an
edition to be reprinted.
8/18

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
3 p.; 25 x 20 cm.
Discusses proposed publications.
8/19

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
Discusses religious education.
8/20

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Beaconsfield
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
About a 3rd letter on the prospect
of a Peace.
8/21

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Bath
4 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
"Madness" in England and Ireland;
Dr. Troy, catholic archbishop of
Dublin.
8/22

did.unittitle: AL to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Bath
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
The business of the committee on the
French immigrants; letter is not
entirely in the hand of Burke.
8/23

did.unittitle: Autograph Envelope to Walker King, bp. Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Bath
8 x 12 cm
Postal Cancellations.
8/24

did.unittitle: AL to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
Further discussion about the French
immigrants.
"Burke Correspondence", vii, 214.
8/25

did.unittitle: AL to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
[1796 after Mar 24]
n.p.
2 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
The grant to Penn School.
"Burke Correspondence", viii, 445.
8/26

did.unittitle: AL to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
[1796 after Oct 24]
n.p.
3 p.; 25 x 20 cm.
Discusses an "insertion" presumably
for a publication; mentions various
French nobles; partly written by
Miss Hickey.
"Burke Correspondence", ix.
8/27

did.unittitle: BURKE, JANE MARY (NUGENT), 1734-1812
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
Financial matters.
8/28

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 24 x 18 cm.
Personal and financial matters.
8/29

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
Business concerning Mr. Noble and
Mr. Smith; mentions William Henry
Cavendish Bentinck, 3rd duke of
Portland (1738-1809).
8/30

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
On the death of the bishop of Bangor.
8/31

did.unittitle: BOURKE, JOHN
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
3 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
Thoughts on England's reputation
abroad.
8/32

did.unittitle: BURKE, RICHARD, 1758-1794
ALS to [Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
On William Henry Cavendish Bentinck,
3rd duke of Portland (1738-1809).
8/33

did.unittitle: ALS to John King
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
2 p.; 18 x 12 cm.
Financial matters.
8/35

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
3 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
Financial matters.
8/36

did.unittitle: FITZWILLIAM, WILLIAM WENTWORTH, 2ND EARL, 1748-1833
ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Wentworth
2 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
On the death of Richard Burke, Jr.
(1758-1794).
8/37

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
York
2 p.; 22 x 19 cm.
On the death of Richard Burke, Jr.
(1758-1794).
8/38

did.unittitle: ALS to Walker King, bp. of Rochester (1755-1827)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Wentworth
1 p.; 16 x 12 cm.
On Charles X of France (1757-1836)
as a Burke reader.
8/39

did.unittitle: STOCKDALE, JOHN
ALS to Richard Brocklesby (1722-1797)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Piccadilly [London]
3 p.; 24 x 19 cm.
Seeks manuscript of Regicide Peace.
8/40

did.unittitle: KING, WALKER, BP. OF ROCHESTER, 1755-1827
AL(draft) to Charles X, king of France (1757-1836)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
3 p.; 23 x 19 cm.
Sends copy of Burke's "Works".
8/41
